projectDescription: A Terraform module that creates and manages AWS EMR resources including EC2-based clusters, serverless applications, virtual clusters on EKS, and EMR Studios.
keyFeatures: EMR clusters using instance fleets or instance groups in public or private subnets
EMR Serverless applications for Spark and Hive workloads
EMR Virtual Clusters running on Amazon EKS
EMR Studios with IAM or SSO authentication
Managed security groups for master, core, and task nodes
IAM roles for autoscaling, EMR service, and EC2 instance profiles
Managed scaling policies for automatic cluster resizing
Support for EMR managed IAM policies v2
publicApiSurface: var.create - Controls if resources should be created
var.master_instance_fleet - Instance Fleet configuration for master node
var.core_instance_fleet - Instance Fleet configuration for core node
var.task_instance_fleet - Instance Fleet configuration for task node
var.master_instance_group - Instance Group configuration for master node
var.core_instance_group - Instance Group configuration for core node
var.task_instance_group - Instance Group configuration for task node
var.create_managed_security_groups - Toggle managed security group creation
var.create_service_iam_role - Toggle service IAM role creation
var.create_iam_instance_profile - Toggle EC2 IAM instance profile creation
output.cluster_arn - The ARN of the cluster
output.cluster_id - The ID of the cluster
output.managed_master_security_group_id - ID of the managed master security group
